title: Piquant Crispy Thai Shrimp Tom Yum
description: A kid-friendly Thai dish featuring crispy shrimp in a citrusy Tom Yum sauce, made with amaretti and candy for a sweet twist, and keto-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix the crushed amaretti cookies and candy melts in a bowl.
Dip each shrimp into the cookie mixture, coating evenly.
Place the coated shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the shrimp in the oven for 12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the Tom Yum paste, fish sauce, and lime juice to the pan, stirring constantly.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked shrimp to the sauce and toss to coat.
